name: copy_paste_functionality
description: Ease of copying and pasting text or links.
examples: Cut and paste is horrible.
Copying embedded links and pasting it elsewhere is worthless, in that it doesn't work at all.

name: file_management
description: System for organizing and saving files.
examples: Since iOS lacks a file structure, it's difficult to save documents to a set location.

name: image_handling
description: Process of managing or editing images.
examples: Image handling isn't the greatest thing in the world, but there are workarounds.

name: trackpad_support
description: Availability or need for trackpad navigation.
examples: There are things that we take for granted on a computer, like trackpads and easy copy/paste, that are necessary to make this work better.

name: content_creation
description: Suitability for creating written or visual content.
examples: But if you want it for creating content, it falls short.
If you're an artist, you'll be impressed.

name: content_consumption
description: Suitability for media consumption like videos and music.
examples: Now, if you want the iPad Pro for just a consumption device (music, videos, photos), this thing is a Five Star home run device.

name: app_compatibility
description: Performance and integration with specific applications.
examples: And the Pencil works really well with the Amazon Kindle app, so highlighting and saving notes is incredible.

name: ease_of_use
description: The product is easy to set up and operate.
examples: He was easy to set up and to use

name: display_quality
description: The screen provides clear and sharp visuals.
examples: Crisp screen

name: security_features
description: Includes hardware or software for secure access.
examples: fingerprint scan for password

name: delivery_speed
description: The product arrived quickly or on time.
examples: Excellent delivery time
arrived on tiime

name: packaging_condition
description: The state of the box or wrapping upon arrival.
examples: The packing was not nice

name: physical_damage
description: Visible scratches or dents on the device.
examples: got a small scratch near the edge

name: device_integration
description: The ability to connect or sync the device with other hardware or accounts.
examples: it’s easy too link your iPhone with iPad

name: web_browsing
description: Using the device to access and navigate the internet.
examples: great for browsing the web

name: email_management
description: Functionality for sending, receiving, or managing emails.
examples: checking emails
I use it mostly for replying too email

name: video_conferencing
description: Capability to conduct video calls or virtual meetings.
examples: video conferencing with my doc appointments
FaceTime is amazing

name: gaming_performance
description: The quality and visual clarity of games played on the device.
examples: playing games the graphics are so clear and pretty
